page_metadata.biotools__summary: NFnetFU (Neuro Fuzzy network Fusion) is a modularised integrative pipeline for microbiome data analysis and diseases specific prioritisation for targeted research which addresses problems surrounding collinearity, sparsity and effect size in data..
